headline: Seaplane SPLASH 💦✈️ Hard-Lands 🍑🌊 in Manhattan River
text: Yo 🗣️ KODIAK 100 🐻✈️ just went FULL CAPSIZE 💦😭 after a HAMPTONS 🍾🏖️ flex trip turned into a wave-riding NIGHTMARE 🌊💥! Plane touched down HARD 🍑🔨 like it owed the East River rent 💸🌊, snapping a wing STRUT like a bad TikTok trend 💔📉! FAA ☎️ said 'NO ATC 🍔🎧, you're on your own, king 👑✈️' while the pilot tried to land like a drunk goose 🪿😵💫! Eight lucky passengers 🧍‍♂️🧍‍♀️ got RESCUED 🛟🚒 by NYFD heroes 🦸‍♂️💦, two got minor boo-boos 🩹😣 and said 'nah fam 🚫🏥' to the medics! Plane stayed UPRIGHT like it was on Red Bull 🥤✈️ then got TOWED 🛳️ back to dock like a sad party balloon 🎈! This is the SECOND splash 💦 in three weeks – last time a two-seater got yeeted 🌊 by another wave near Queens 👑🏙️! Rich Hamptons crowd 🍾💅 almost turned into fish food 🐟🍽️ but everyone walked away – except the strut, RIP 🪦! FAA gonna INVESTIGATE 🔍 like it's the next true crime pod 🎙️📜!
